methods.name: CheckAssemblyForVersionMismatches(System.Reflection.Assembly)
methods.summary: Checks that an assembly does not have any dependencies that have already been loaded into the appDomain with an incompatible to the one Dynamo requires.

returns.doc: returns a list of fileLoad exceptions - if the list is empty no mismatched assemblies were encountered

methods.name: MakeCLIModel(Dynamo.Applications.StartupUtils.CommandLineArguments)
methods.summary: Use this overload to construct a DynamoModel in CLI context when the location of ASM to use is known, host analytics info is known and you want to set data paths.

methods.name: MakeCLIModel(string, string, string, Dynamo.Models.HostAnalyticsInfo)
methods.signature: Dynamo.Models.DynamoModel MakeCLIModel(string asmPath, string userDataFolder, string commonDataFolder, Dynamo.Models.HostAnalyticsInfo info)
methods.summary: Use this overload to construct a DynamoModel in CLI context when the location of ASM to use is known, host analytics info is known and you want to set data paths.

params.name: asmPath
params.doc: Path to directory containing geometry library binaries

params.name: userDataFolder
params.doc: Path to be used by PathResolver for UserDataFolder

params.name: commonDataFolder
params.doc: Path to be used by PathResolver for CommonDataFolder

params.name: info
params.doc: Host analytics info specifying Dynamo launching host related information.

methods.name: MakeModel(bool, bool, string, Dynamo.Models.HostAnalyticsInfo)
methods.signature: Dynamo.Models.DynamoModel MakeModel(bool CLImode, bool noNetworkMode, string asmPath, Dynamo.Models.HostAnalyticsInfo info)
methods.summary: Use this overload to construct a DynamoModel when the location of ASM to use is known and host analytics info is known.

params.name: CLImode
params.doc: CLI mode starts the model in test mode and uses a separate path resolver.

params.name: noNetworkMode
params.doc: Option to initialize Dynamo in no-network mode

params.name: asmPath
params.doc: Path to directory containing geometry library binaries

params.name: info
params.doc: Host analytics info specifying Dynamo launching host related information.

methods.name: MakeModel(bool, string, bool, string, Dynamo.Models.HostAnalyticsInfo)
methods.signature: Dynamo.Models.DynamoModel MakeModel(bool CLImode, string CLIlocale, bool noNetworkMode, string asmPath, Dynamo.Models.HostAnalyticsInfo info)
methods.summary: Use this overload to construct a DynamoModel when the location of ASM to use is known and host analytics info is known.

params.name: CLImode
params.doc: CLI mode starts the model in test mode and uses a separate path resolver.

params.name: CLIlocale
params.doc: CLI argument to force dynamo locale

params.name: noNetworkMode
params.doc: Option to initialize Dynamo in no-network mode

params.name: asmPath
params.doc: Path to directory containing geometry library binaries

params.name: info
params.doc: Host analytics info specifying Dynamo launching host related information.

methods.name: MakeModel(bool, string, string)
methods.signature: Dynamo.Models.DynamoModel MakeModel(bool CLImode, string asmPath, string hostName)
methods.summary: Use this overload to construct a DynamoModel when the location of ASM to use is known and host name is known.

params.name: CLImode
params.doc: CLI mode starts the model in test mode and uses a separate path resolver.

params.name: asmPath
params.doc: Path to directory containing geometry library binaries

params.name: hostName
params.doc: Dynamo variation identified by host.

methods.name: PreloadShapeManager(ref string, ref string)
methods.signature: void PreloadShapeManager(ref string geometryFactoryPath, ref string preloaderLocation)
methods.summary: Attempts to load the geometry library binaries using the location params.

params.name: geometryFactoryPath
params.doc: libG ProtoInterface path

params.name: preloaderLocation
params.doc: libG folder path

methods.name: PreloadShapeManager(ref string, ref string, ref System.Version, ref string)
methods.signature: void PreloadShapeManager(ref string geometryFactoryPath, ref string preloaderLocation, ref System.Version asmVersion, ref string asmPath)
methods.summary: Attempts to load the geometry library binaries and returns ASM version information.

params.name: geometryFactoryPath
params.doc: libG ProtoInterface path

params.name: preloaderLocation
params.doc: libG folder path

params.name: asmVersion
params.doc: Version of the loaded ASM, or null if version cannot be determined

params.name: asmPath
params.doc: Path where ASM binaries are located, or empty string if not found

events.name: ASMPreloadFailure
events.summary: Raised when loading of the ASM binaries fails. A failure message is passed as a parameter.
